rule_metadata.name: apt_equation_doublefantasy_genericresource
rule_metadata.description: Rule to detect DoubleFantasy encoded config http://goo.gl/ivt8EW

rules.rule_text:
rule apt_equation_doublefantasy_genericresource
{
	meta:
		copyright = "Kaspersky Lab"
		description = "Rule to detect DoubleFantasy encoded config http://goo.gl/ivt8EW"
		version = "1.0"
		last_modified = "2015-02-16"
		reference = "http://securelist.com/blog/research/68750/equation-the-death-star-of-malware-galaxy/"

	strings:
		$mz = "MZ"
		$a1 = {06 00 42 00 49 00 4E 00 52 00 45 00 53 00}
		$a2 = "yyyyyyyyyyyyyyyy"
		$a3 = "002"

	condition:
		(( $mz at 0 ) and all of ( $a* ) ) and filesize < 500000
}
